class.name: MCPSceneSerializer
class.brief_description: Serializes Godot scene trees to JSON for MCP protocol.
class.description: Converts scene tree structures to JSON-compatible dictionaries with configurable depth, node limits, and property filtering. Used internally by [GodotMCPServer] to provide scene data to Claude Code.

method.name: serialize_scene
method.description: Serializes the scene tree starting from [param root] to a dictionary.

method.name: set_max_depth
method.description: Sets the maximum depth to traverse in the scene tree.

method.name: set_max_nodes
method.description: Sets the maximum number of nodes to serialize.
